name: Hoax.ai Output Boundary Schema
governing_principle: Before the system can produce outputs, the system must govern what an output is allowed to say. An output is a bounded evidence-posture statement about an artifact or evidence chain, not a verdict about truth, authenticity, people, institutions, brands, organizations, or events.

required_output_fields.definition: Unique identifier for a future output instance.
required_output_fields.prohibited_use: Subject identification, verdict encoding, score encoding.
required_output_fields.boundary_requirement: Identifier only. No accusation or verdict semantics.

required_output_fields.definition: Output boundary schema version reference.
required_output_fields.prohibited_use: Truth verdict marker, capability claim.

required_output_fields.definition: Evidence Posture Classification Protocol version used.
required_output_fields.prohibited_use: Active tool claim, automation authority claim.

required_output_fields.definition: Evidence Posture Taxonomy version used.
required_output_fields.prohibited_use: Invented posture states, verdict taxonomy.

required_output_fields.definition: Evidence Posture Standard version used.
required_output_fields.prohibited_use: Sufficiency bypass, verdict standard.

required_output_fields.definition: Bounded description of the artifact or evidence chain being reviewed.
required_output_fields.prohibited_use: Subject accusation scope, event verdict scope.
required_output_fields.boundary_requirement: Artifact or evidence chain focus only.

required_output_fields.definition: Type of artifact under review.
required_output_fields.prohibited_use: Person type, institution type, subject classification.

required_output_fields.definition: One bounded taxonomy posture state for the artifact or evidence chain.
required_output_fields.prohibited_use: Invented states, verdict states, fake/real states, subject states.

required_output_fields.definition: Concise bounded explanation of why the posture state was selected.
required_output_fields.prohibited_use: Truth verdict summary, subject accusation summary.

required_output_fields.definition: Structured list mapping findings to the nine taxonomy/standard dimensions.
required_output_fields.prohibited_use: Subject judgment findings, verdict findings.
required_output_fields.boundary_requirement: Dimension findings on artifact evidence only.

required_output_fields.definition: List of missing, weak, unstable, or unresolved factors affecting posture.
required_output_fields.prohibited_use: Subject guilt factors, fraud proof factors.

required_output_fields.definition: Required statement that posture applies to artifact or evidence chain, not connected subjects.
required_output_fields.prohibited_use: Subject accusation, guilt transfer, institutional judgment.
required_output_fields.boundary_requirement: Must explicitly separate artifact posture from subject judgment.

required_output_fields.definition: Required list of what the output must not be read to mean.
required_output_fields.prohibited_use: Empty list, verdict encouragement.

required_output_fields.definition: Qualitative boundary statement explaining limits of reliance. Not a numeric score.
required_output_fields.prohibited_use: Numeric score, percentage certainty, truth probability.

required_output_fields.definition: Optional bounded next checks for further examination.
required_output_fields.prohibited_use: Accusation steps, certainty claims, upload prompts.

required_output_fields.definition: Optional references to source records when available.
required_output_fields.prohibited_use: Subject accusation via source, unsupported external claims.

required_output_fields.definition: Optional references to claim records when available.
required_output_fields.prohibited_use: Truth verdict on claim, subject accusation.

required_output_fields.definition: Governance status of the output instance.
required_output_fields.prohibited_use: Public tool status, live service status without gate.

required_output_fields.definition: System, protocol, or manual process that created the output.
required_output_fields.prohibited_use: Active classifier claim before engine exists, automation authority.
required_output_fields.boundary_requirement: Accurate process attribution without false capability claim.

required_output_fields.definition: Date the output was last reviewed.
required_output_fields.prohibited_use: Certification date, legal verification date.

prohibited_output_language: This confirms the event did not happen.
allowed_output_language_examples: The artifact has a provenance-limited posture because the available source chain is incomplete.
The evidence chain is partially supported within the available context.
The available information is not sufficient for a responsible posture classification.
This posture applies to the artifact, not to any connected subject.
The output should not be interpreted as a truth verdict, authenticity certification, or accusation.

minimum_output_template.notes: Future template only. Not an active public tool or service.
